message:
fix(backup): restore contentless FTS5 tables via shadow table dump

Contentless FTS5 tables (content='') don't store original text, so
SELECT * returns empty strings. The previous DumpRows strategy replayed
empty INSERTs that produced a valid row count but an empty search index
(MATCH returned 0 results).

New DumpShadowTables strategy dumps the FTS5 shadow tables (_config,
_content, _data, _docsize, _idx) directly with PRAGMA writable_schema,
preserving the actual tokenized index data for correct MATCH queries
after restore.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
